corrections: No load-bearing fact was broken. Every attack vector confirmed the debate's PASS (verdict C) rather than refuting it. (a) STALE-ANCHOR: sop_fair_value (~$230) is built on the freshest event — the May 27, 2026 Q1 FY27 print and the raised FY27/FY28 ladder — not pre-guidance financials; no staleness. (b) NUMBER TRUTH: record rev $2.418B/+28% YoY, data center $1.833B = 76% of mix, GAAP EPS $0.04 vs non-GAAP $0.80, non-GAAP GM 58.9%, interconnect FY27 guide raised to >70%, DCI to ~$1B run-rate in FY28 (~2x FY26's ~$500M), and the ~$16.5B FY28 target ALL verify against the SEC 8-K (Ex-99.1) and corroborating coverage. (c) THESIS WEAKNESS confirmed AS BEAR ARGUES: the AI-scale-out catalyst has substantially fired (+~300% TTM); spot ~$310-313 trades ~30% ABOVE the ~$238.75 consensus (44-analyst) target — the market is more bullish than the sell-side, the opposite of a mispricing; concentration on an undisclosed flagship XPU customer + Broadcom rivalry is real; moat NARROW on custom ASIC. (d) HIDDEN DISQUALIFIER: none new — the Polariton (>1THz plasmonic, path to 3.2T) and Celestial AI EAM ($3.25B, up to $5.5B, closed Feb 2026) deals verify as stated; balance sheet modest net debt. The thesis (PASS at this price; great franchise, full valuation, inverted risk/reward) survives the kill-check intact.
